# unifi_site (Data Source)

Look up a UniFi site by `id`, `name`, or `internal_reference`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a UniFi site by human-readable name.
data "unifi_site" "main" {
  name = "Default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Site UUID.
- `internal_reference` (String) Legacy internal site reference used by older APIs.
- `name` (String) Human-readable site name.
